author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Implement a bounded selection-physics abstraction layer on top of the current edp1_symbolic runtime so Phase R1 can compare multiple regime families without replacing the historical execution stack.
tests_required: schema smoke test for all required regimes
definition_of_done: required regime family set represented in code
legacy control preserved as explicit control path
failure_conditions: legacy control behavior breaks without explicit justification
required regimes exist only as comments or constants without executable path
task drifts into sweep execution or regime winner claims
